statement: In every magma, Equation 1737 (`x = (y * y) * ((y * z) * w)`) implies Equation 2774 (`x = ((y * z) * (x * y)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0013
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op y z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op x y)) x)
